final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of an employee ID badge for 字节跳动 (ByteDance), showing both the front and back sides simultaneously.

Style/medium: photorealistic studio product photography, macro lens sharpness, corporate ID card reference quality
Composition: two badge cards arranged side by side — front face on the left, back face on the right — slight 5-degree tilt on each, centered on a neutral background, 85mm macro lens, shallow depth of field with both cards in focus
Subject: corporate employee ID badge for 字节跳动; front side features the 字节跳动 logo (the "ByteDance" wordmark with the jumping figure icon), employee name placeholder, employee photo placeholder, job title, employee ID number, and department; back side features a magnetic stripe, a QR code or barcode, company address, and a small 字节跳动 watermark logo
Scene/backdrop: clean light-grey studio surface with a soft shadow underneath each card, minimal reflective surface
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead studio light with a subtle fill light from the left, neutral and professional mood, slight specular highlight on the card surface to convey glossy laminate finish
Color palette: card base in white or very light grey; 字节跳动 brand accent in black and the signature ByteDance orange/red; text in dark charcoal; background in neutral off-white
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with visible laminate sheen, slight edge bevel, crisp printed graphics, lanyard hole punch at the top of each card
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动"
Constraints: both front and back sides must be clearly legible and fully visible; card proportions must follow standard CR80 ID card ratio (85.6mm × 54mm); logo placement must respect standard corporate badge layout
Avoid: cartoon or flat illustration style, blurry text, distorted proportions, generic placeholder badge look, watermarks, over-saturated colors
